intended_use: The CellaVision DM1200 with the Advanced RBC Application automatically locates and presents images of blood cells on peripheral blood smears. The operator identifies and verifies the suggested classif
intended_use_full: The CellaVision DM1200 with the Advanced RBC Application automatically locates and presents images of blood cells on peripheral blood smears. The operator identifies and verifies the suggested classification of each cell according to type. The device is intended for blood samples that have been flagged as abnormal by an automated cell counter and is intended to be used by skilled operators, trained in the use of the device and in recognition of blood cells.
target_condition: Abnormal red blood cell morphology in peripheral blood samples
ground_truth: Manual microscopy (reference method) for Color, Shape, Inclusions and clinical significant morphologies; automated cell counter (non-reference standard) for Size characterization (Macrocytes, Microcytes, Anisocytosis)
other_metrics: Overall agreement, positive percent agreement (PPA), and negative percent agreement (NPA) for morphology group Size; efficiency, sensitivity, and specificity for groups Color, Shape, Inclusions and clinical significant morphologies; sensitivity and specificity for individual morphological characteristics - all reported to have fulfilled acceptance criteria
